customer.title: Customer
customer.description: Represents a customer of the warehouse.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

address.description: The physical address of the customer.

fatherName.description: The father's name of the customer.

commodity.title: Commodity
commodity.description: Represents a type of commodity with specific rent rates.

name.description: The name of the commodity (e.g., Paddy, Maize).

billingType.description: The billing structure for the commodity.

monthlyRate.description: The rent rate per bag per month, if billingType is 'monthly'.

minBillingMonths.description: The minimum number of months to charge for if billingType is 'monthly'.

insuranceRate.description: The insurance rate per bag per year, if billingType is 'monthly'.

rate6Months.description: The rent rate per bag for a 6-month period, if billingType is 'slab'.

rate1Year.description: The rent rate per bag for a 1-year period, if billingType is 'slab'.

lot.title: Lot
lot.description: Represents a specific storage location within the warehouse.

name.description: The unique identifier for the lot (e.g., A1/Top).

capacity.description: The storage capacity of the lot in bags.

storageRecord.title: Storage Record
storageRecord.description: Represents a record of items being stored by a customer.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being stored.

location.description: The location within the warehouse where the items are stored (Lot No.).

bagsStored.description: The number of bags being stored.

storageStartDate.description: The date when the storage period began.

storageEndDate.description: The date when the storage period ended. Null if still active.

billingCycle.description: The current billing cycle for the record.

totalRentBilled.description: The total rent amount that has been billed for this record.

lorryTractorNo.description: The Lorry or Tractor number for the delivery.

weight.description: The weight of the stored items.

inflowType.description: The type of inflow, either Direct from the vehicle or from a Plot.

dryingRecordId.description: The ID of the associated drying record, if inflow type is 'Plot'.

hamaliDetails.description: A detailed breakdown of hamali charges.

insuranceRate.description: The insurance rate per bag per year at time of inflow.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Represents a payment made towards a storage record.

date.description: The date the payment was made.
The date the expense was incurred.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer this expense is associated with (e.g., for Hamali Paid).

borrowing.title: Borrowing
borrowing.description: Represents a loan taken from an individual or entity.

lenderName.description: The name of the person or entity from whom the money was borrowed.

principal.description: The original amount of money borrowed.

interestRate.description: The monthly interest rate in percent (e.g., 2 for 2%).

dateTaken.description: The date the loan was taken.

status.description: The current status of the loan.

lending.title: Lending
lending.description: Represents a loan given to an individual or entity.

borrowerName.description: The name of the person or entity to whom the money was lent.

principal.description: The original amount of money lent.

interestRate.description: The monthly interest rate in percent (e.g., 2 for 2%).

dateGiven.description: The date the loan was given.

status.description: The current status of the loan.

otherIncome.title: Other Income
otherIncome.description: Represents miscellaneous income not from storage rent or hamali.

description.description: A description of the income source.

date.description: The date the income was received.

unloadingRecord.title: Unloading Record
unloadingRecord.description: Represents a record of items being unloaded from a vehicle.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being unloaded.

lorryTractorNo.description: The Lorry or Tractor number for the delivery.

unloadingDate.description: The date when the unloading took place.

bagsUnloaded.description: The number of bags being unloaded.

status.description: The current status of the process.

hamaliPerBag.description: The hamali charge per bag for this unloading event.

totalHamali.description: The total hamali charge for this unloading event.

billNo.description: The bill number associated with this unloading record.

dryingRecord.title: Drying Record
dryingRecord.description: Represents the entire drying process for a commodity, from unloading to billing.

unloadingRecordId.description: The ID of the source unloading record.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being processed.

bagsForDrying.description: The number of bags sent for drying.

bagsPacked.description: The number of bags after packing is complete.

status.description: The current stage of the drying process.

dryingStartDate.description: The date the drying process began.

packingDate.description: The date packing was completed. Null if not yet packed.

billingDate.description: The date the process was billed. Null if not yet billed.

totalDryingHamali.description: The total hamali charge for this drying process.

hamaliDetails.description: A detailed breakdown of hamali charges for the drying process.

workerHamaliPayable.description: The total hamali amount payable to workers for this drying process.

warehouseInfo.title: Warehouse Info
warehouseInfo.description: General information and settings for a warehouse.

capitalInvestment.description: The total capital invested in the business.

annualInterestRate.description: The annual interest rate used to calculate cost of capital.

textbeeDeviceId.description: Your textbee.dev Device ID (optional, for device gateway).

smsInflowTemplate.description: Template for SMS sent on new inflow.

smsOutflowTemplate.description: Template for SMS sent on outflow.

smsUnloadingTemplate.description: Template for SMS sent on unloading.

smsPaymentTemplate.description: Template for SMS sent on bulk payment.

smsPendingDuesTemplate.description: Template for SMS sent for pending dues reminder.

appUser.title: App User
appUser.description: Defines an application user and their role.

role.description: The assigned role for the user.

warehouseId.description: The ID of the warehouse this user belongs to. Empty for super-admin.

managedWarehouse.title: Managed Warehouse
managedWarehouse.description: Represents a warehouse subscription managed by the super-admin.

ownerEmail.description: Email of the owner for login.

/customers/{customerId}.description: Stores individual customer documents, scoped by warehouseId.

/commodities/{commodityId}.description: Stores commodity types, scoped by warehouseId.

/lots/{lotId}.description: Stores lot information, scoped by warehouseId.

/storageRecords/{recordId}.description: Stores individual storage records, scoped by warehouseId.

/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Stores individual expense documents, scoped by warehouseId.

/borrowings/{borrowingId}.description: Stores individual borrowing/loan records, scoped by warehouseId.

/lendings/{lendingId}.description: Stores individual lending/loan records, scoped by warehouseId.

/otherIncomes/{incomeId}.description: Stores individual miscellaneous income records, scoped by warehouseId.

/unloadingRecords/{unloadingId}.description: Stores records of the unloading process, scoped by warehouseId.

/dryingRecords/{dryingId}.description: Stores records of the drying process, scoped by warehouseId.

/managedWarehouses/{warehouseId}.description: Stores warehouse subscription details managed by the super-admin.
